title: cenostigma pinnatum subsp. oblongifolium
intro: Cenostigma pinnatum subsp. oblongifolium is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical regions in Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cenostigma pinnatum subsp. oblongifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
